positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a lunar crescent moon embracing a sprawling, intricate constellation of zodiac symbols and celestial bodies. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, featuring deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasting with brilliant gold and silver lines. The style must be highly graphic, reminiscent of Art Nouveau mixed with modern cosmic diagram aesthetics. Utilize clean, flowing silhouettes and crisp linework against a solid, dark background, designed to look perfect when printed on apparel. Include subtle stardust motes and stylized astronomical tools like armillary spheres, maintaining a sense of wonder and scientific elegance. Flat graphic design, vector art, highly detailed.
